questions: What is the treatment goal (relieve/control symptoms)? (Yes/No)
If yes, what is the goal (lower respiratory tract infection/inflammation, remove bronchial secretions, control symptoms with anti-inflammatory therapy, control symptoms with additional agents)?
If the goal is lower respiratory tract infection/inflammation, what is the route of administration (Oral/Intravenous)?
If the route is Oral, what is the specific antibiotic prescribed (Amoxicillin/clavulanic acid, Quinolone (ciprofloxacin), Azithromycin, Doxycycline)?
If the route is Intravenous, what is the specific antibiotic prescribed (Cefuroxime, Ceftriaxone, Amoxicillin/clavulanic acid)?
If Pseudomonas is the causative organism, what is the route of administration (Oral/Intravenous)?
If Pseudomonas is the causative organism and the route is Oral, what is the specific antibiotic prescribed (Ciprofloxacin, Piperacillin/tazobactam, Ceftazidime, Meropenem + Aminoglycoside)?
If the goal is to remove bronchial secretions, is postural drainage indicated? (Yes/No)
If the goal is to control symptoms with anti-inflammatory therapy, are Corticosteroids (Inhaled and oral) or NSAIDs (Inhaled and oral) considered? (Yes/No)
If the goal is to control symptoms with additional agents, are Long-acting agonists, Long-acting anticholinergics, Methylxanthines, or LT receptor antagonists considered? (Yes/No)
If yes, what specific chest physiotherapy technique is used (Independent, Device-dependant, Manual, Gravity-assisted positioning, Test of incremental respiratory endurance)?
